title: Richly Garlicky Turkish Cheese Kunefe
description: A low-carb, garlicky Turkish dish featuring a mixture powder and yuzu-cure, served on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the garlic powder, mixture powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the crumbled Turkish cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and yuzu juice.
Add the egg mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until smooth.
Unroll the kadaifi pastry and cut it into 4 equal pieces.
Place a piece of pastry on a cedar plank and brush with melted butter.
Spoon the cheese mixture onto the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the pastry over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Brush the top of the pastry with melted butter and bake for 25 minutes.
